gated_minus_global.interpretation: mean_delta ≤ 0 indicates gated personalisation is non-inferior (or superior) to always-global on mean regret

decision: Retain the global spectral default. The n=8 policy is non-inferior but not superior and therefore does not unlock personalisation.
limitations: Only eight independent units are available; tissue strata contain 2-3 units.
The three DLPFC units are donor aggregates from one study.
Five external-study feature vectors have partial target-free feature coverage.
The common panel is restricted to seven sklearn methods available on all units.
